description: You are a molecular biologist designing a recombinant AAV vector. Map the Inverted Terminal Repeats (ITRs) on the wild-type AAV2 genome (~/UGENE_Data/aav2_genome.fasta). Identify inverted repeats with a minimum length of 30 bp, 100% identity, and a maximum distance of 5000 bp. Annotate the found repeat pairs as 'ITR' and export the annotated sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/aav2_results/aav2_annotated.gb. Create a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/aav2_results/itr_report.txt including the total sequence length, the number of inverted repeat pairs found, the start and end coordinates of the repeats at the extreme 5' and 3' ends, and a brief statement on the biological function of ITRs.
